source.title: US plans strict AI contract rules requiring 'Any Lawful Use' access for government
source.summary: The U.S. government is preparing stricter AI procurement rules requiring companies to grant the federal government an irrevocable license for any lawful use of their models. The GSA has also terminated Anthropic's participation in the OneGov program. The draft policy, developed by the General Services Administration, also mandates neutrality and transparency disclosures in AI systems.
